class.name: UtilityAIBTRoot
class.brief_description: The main node for the Utility AI Behaviour Tree nodes.
class.description: The main node for the Utility AI Behaviour Tree nodes. The root node is ticked to update the state of the behaviour tree.

method.name: tick
method.description: Use this method to tick the tree. You can provide any Godot variant type as a parameter (usually a node used as an actor or a [Dictionary] used as a blackboard), along with a delta-time. These are passed to all the child nodes of the behaviour tree during ticks.
